title: iGate India is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Mid-Level)

jsonLd.title: iGate India is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Mid-Level)
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at iGate India. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Full Stack Developer to strengthen our Hyderabad-based team.

About iGate India:
iGate India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in REST APIs
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in Machine Learning
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in Kubernetes

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Hyderabad, Telangana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with iGate India!
